title: anthoxanthum gunckelii
intro: Anthoxanthum gunckelii, also known as sweet grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in wound healing and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of sweet grass include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving respiratory health. Sweet grass can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried for use in smudging ceremonies, making it a versatile and valuable plant in traditional medicine.
